name: Crispix Mix Sweet Minglers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large microwavable bowl, melt chocolate on HIGH for 1 minute.
2. Stir and heat an additional 30 seconds at HIGH or until melted.
3. Stir in peanut butter and peanuts.
4. Gently stir Crispix cereal into the peanut butter mixture until well coated.
5. Place powdered sugar in a 2-gallon storage bag.
6. Add the coated cereal to the sugar and close the bag.
7. Gently toss until well coated.
8. Store in an airtight container in the fridge.
